top_values: Recommended Citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Geothermal Power Tracker, March 2026 release" (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set.)
Project Name in Local Language / Script
Owner Name in Local Language / Script
Year the project is or is expected to be commissioned.
Year the plant is or is expected to be taken offline.
The type of geothermal power is not specified.
The project is inferred to be shelved because, or no progress has been observed for at least two years.
The project is inferred to be cancelled because, or no progress has been observed for at least four years
The company that operates the project.
The company that directly owns the plant. When owned by a special purpose vehicle, the next level of ownership is provided.
Suspension of the project operation has been announced.
Such systems use three flashes to generate three different steam pressures: high, intermediate, and low. The steam flows are then used to rotate two or more turbines.
Subregion location of the project based on United Nations definition.
Subnational unit where the project is located.
Region location of the project based on United Nations definition.
Qualitative notes on employment numbers related to construction or operation of the project.
Projects where the remaining water after the first flash is still warm enough to flash again and used to run a second, low-pressure steam turbine.
Projects where the high-pressure geothermal fluid is converted to steam only once.
Projects where the high-pressure geothermal fluid is converted to steam but the number of flashes is unknown.
This includes mothballed plants - whenever the unit stops operating.
The company that performs day-to-day operations and maintenance of the project.
Roman numerals are changed to numbers. If the Owner uses non-sequential numbers or other characters, those are used.
Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name the owner or operating company uses was taken.
Left blank for local languages use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise operator name in local script included if possible.
Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise local name in local script provided if possible.
Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise direct owner name included in local script if possible.
Latest date was taken when original data source provided a range. Start years not included for projects that are cancelled or shelved.
